acceptance_criteria: reproduce_safety_trace.py (or notebook) included and runnable with documented command
final_decision_table.csv present and matches CSV shown in artifacts
expert_memo.md included and resolves O3 ambiguity by demonstrating both interpretations and selecting one with justification
verifier deterministic precheck passes and grader ambiguity flags cleared for ri_3
validation_steps_for_revised_attempt: Confirm reproduce_safety_trace.py runs with provided command and regenerates safety_trace_matrix.csv and remediation_backlog.md identically (or document deliberate changes).
Verify final_decision_table.csv contains every option combination and per-record post-implementation values; attach it to final artifact refs.
Ensure expert_memo.md documents sensitivity test inputs and O3 interpretations with numeric outputs.
Update attempt manifest/deliverables to include new artifacts and rerun deterministic precheck.

priority_items: {'rubric_item': 'ri_1', 'issue': 'Required reproducible_workbook (script/notebook) and final_decision_table.csv not provided in artifact refs; used an equal-weight assumption because embedded packet lacked weights (documented as needs_review).', 'impact': 'Limits independent reproducibility and reviewer ability to validate per-record arithmetic and combination math.'}

{'rubric_item': 'ri_3', 'issue': 'Ambiguous interpretation of O3 impact (memo marks as needs_review) and some remediation table rows truncated in previews.', 'impact': 'Recommendation validity depends on interpretation; reviewers need explicit math under each interpretation to accept the recommended option set.'}

planned_changes: Add a runnable script reproduce_safety_trace.py (or notebook) that: ingests the embedded packet, computes per-record contributions using the documented formula, performs +/-5% sensitivity on observed_risk_score, enumerates remediation option combinations, applies option impacts, and writes safety_trace_matrix.csv and final_decision_table.csv. Include a single-line run command in the script header.

Produce final_decision_table.csv showing per-option arithmetic: cost, remaining budget, aggregate reduction, per-record reduction, post-implementation observed_risk_score, margin, and classification for every option combination.

Add expert_memo.md (distinct artifact) that explains sensitivity test inputs, the exact commands/notebook cells used, justification for sensitivity target selection, and the decision rationale for the recommended option set.

Explicitly evaluate O3 under both plausible interpretations (A: multiplicative reduction of trace_gap contribution by 9%; B: direct improvement of normalized margin by 9%), append both result tables to the memo and mark the chosen interpretation with justification.

Update remediation_backlog.md to reference the runnable script and final_decision_table.csv, include a worked example showing the remediation math for one option set, and ensure no truncation of critical rows in the final published artifacts.
Run the script and attach the regenerated artifacts to the attempt (safety_trace_matrix.csv, remediation_backlog.md, final_decision_table.csv, reproduce_safety_trace.py, expert_memo.md).
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Add missing reproducibility artifacts and resolve ambiguous interpretation for remediation option O3 so reviewers can independently reproduce and validate results.
